textByHashes.80affb071d645b47f77e534a5fbeacc0f708f4b5: It's a bit rude of 'em to take up the whole bridge with their conversation, isn't it, mate?
textByHashes.29b095ac5421ef087ac0624c25b976ae4fab9d8a: A good point well made, mate. Who are we to decide that the dig is more impor'ant than a personal disagreement between two people?
textByHashes.3ac158fc6d2296dd35f09883a2f83789f3e3ab5f: We're part of a dig into some ruins beneath Cam Torum, but the way's blocked by these folks.
textByHashes.6687f7f4137e9ff841f8e9dcd696ca4fa32b8a01: Thanks for that, mate. You should speak to Jess inside. She'll be in the north of the city. She could use a problem solver like yourself.
textByHashes.ee4ae34bbea0d269a1eb9572b96a0418ef23a889: You should head inside, mate. Remember, Jess will be in the north of the city. She could use a problem solver like yourself.
textByHashes.0871546e7605ef5f19617515a415ac43d4a13ac5: Aye, mate. Livin' a life unable to connect with others because they look different must be miserable.
textByHashes.edab483377fd2c1994d22e8191546cb9f41fba03: That's no worries, mate, I've no issue admitting you're better cut out for building camps in dangerous dungeons than I am.
textByHashes.b925ffaa664ab6a2cbded6ae1f4d087c50694ff4: Aye, mate, I'm content and proud to just be a hard working, decent builder.
textByHashes.c4237b7f5bdb55988be3bd27935b101cf3fc9afb: It's not like we're not aware of the danger we're in, but worryin' about it ain't productive.
textByHashes.93e20017a3b3750bf3af85bbd3d60d3114f7473b: Even if that's just emotionally. We believe in you, mate.
textByHashes.30cd8df220735a4d518f9d494c38f85468785d3f: You meant well. You thought you were helpin'. Can't fault you for that part, mate.
textByHashes.5eed3214d6b299c72ef319bef0129b179ec73aa8: And if yer genuinely sorry, best you can do is work to be better, not mope around. So keep your chin up, mate!
textByHashes.0a66f0401a04a03d2fb48da07651962a1e9e0e81: Well, all's well that ends well.
textByHashes.a9cca35b31c35e436927d36aba3e18f63ed0e4e5: Good to see you again, mate.
textByHashes.b3906be4085e9511795cbecee7fea30f7aef67f1: All credit to Jess, o'course, but we're glad to be doing our bit!
textByHashes.6b30cebe58f64973add96df1946c31840d266936: Aye, that nagua ain't to be messed with. She soon dealt with the troublemakers.
textByHashes.7fcc3e626bf6bf484a9709dbf33a317782f2e71f: Aye, they must have had some pretty strong convictions to take on that risk. Ain't it crazy how far some people will go?
textByHashes.b9a204816bb84107216f81e7fb4419f06aff5757: Anyway, mate, look at us getting you all sidetracked. Nice of you to drop in, but don't be letting us distract you now.
textByHashes.9f583cdfe65797a733c4d427961491d802c04428: Tell you what, mate, when the opportunity next presents itself, you should kick back and relax. You've earned it.
